summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine 10-layer decision system. Backend API returns ta_layers with all 10 layers, frontend PatternSVGOverlay correctly renders range overlays with proper priority, and TALayersPanel displays ta_layers data.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC returns ta_layers with 10 layers (structure, impulse, regime, pattern, confluence, probability, scenarios, timing, narrative)
Backend API returns active_range for range mode with correct top/bottom values
Frontend PatternSVGOverlay renders range overlay with blue fill and red/green boundaries
Frontend uses ta_layers and active_range from data prop as source of truth
Range overlay has correct priority (z-index=50) over pattern overlay
1D timeframe shows Loose Range pattern as expected
4H timeframe shows Inverse Head Shoulders pattern as expected
TALayersPanel displays data from ta_layers including structure and regime information
Pattern overlay toggle functionality working correctly
MTF API integration with 6 successful requests to ta-engine endpoints
